channel.title: Raspberry-Pi on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Raspberry-Pi on Arrans github.io

item.title: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
item.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

item.title: alphacep/vosk-api
item.description: Offline speech recognition API for Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi and servers with Python, Java, C# and Node

item.title: thibmaek/awesome-raspberry-pi
item.description: 📝 A curated list of awesome Raspberry Pi tools, projects, images and resources

item.title: geerlingguy/raspberry-pi-pcie-devices
item.description: Raspberry Pi PCI Express device compatibility database

item.title: hybridgroup/yzma
item.description: Go with your own intelligence - Go applications that directly integrate llama.cpp for local inference using hardware acceleration.

item.title: campwill/hal-voice-assistant
item.description: A voice-activated AI assistant modeled after HAL 9000, built with Raspberry Pi and self-hosted services for speech-to-text, language generation, and text-to-speech.

item.title: GloDroid/glodroid_manifest
item.description: Android port that aims to bring both user- and developer-friendly experience in using AOSP with a set of single-board computers (SBC), phones and other devices.
